parsed.production_notes: Presenter exhibits natural human movement, facial expressions, and lighting. Split-screen and text overlays are standard video editing techniques.

characters.appearance: Young adult East Asian male, slim build, fair complexion. Short black hair, rectangular glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black crew-neck sweater over a white collared shirt. Silver watch on left wrist.

scenes.setting: Plain white wall background, bright even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Young East Asian man with glasses stands against a white wall. He wears a black sweater over a white shirt. He holds a smartphone in his left hand and gestures with his right. Neutral expression.

Young East Asian man with glasses stands against a white wall. He wears a black sweater over a white shirt. He holds a smartphone in his right hand and points upwards with his left. Confident expression.

scenes.visual_description: Split-screen showing the same presenter on both sides against a white background. The left side acts out basic phrases, the right side acts out advanced idioms. Small video clips occasionally pop up in the lower center.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Sometimes. Every so often.
Unknown speaker says: Every so often it's, yep.
Character A says: Rarely. Once in a blue moon.
Unknown speaker says: Once in a blue moon.
Character A says: Always. Day in and day out.
Unknown speaker says: Day in and day out.
Character A says: Never. Or, under no circumstances.
Unknown speaker says: Under no circumstances.
scenes.on_screen_text:
B2 🇺🇸
C1 🇺🇸

Always

scenes.setting: Plain white wall background, bright even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Young East Asian man with glasses stands against a white wall. He wears a black sweater over a white shirt. He holds a smartphone in his left hand, showing the screen, and a wired earphone microphone in his right hand near his mouth. Engaged expression.

scenes.visual_description: Presenter stands centered against a white wall. He holds up his phone showing a chat app and speaks into a wired microphone. Text overlays transcribe the conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: The biggest lie about learning an English language? You need a better vocabulary. No, you don't. You need to start speaking. Hey, bro! Can we learn some idioms today?
Unknown speaker says: Idioms are a great idea! Which type of idioms do you want to start with? Something fun like food idioms or maybe business idioms since you like that?
scenes.on_screen_text:
The biggest lie about learning an English language?
You need a better vocabulary
No, you don't
You need to start speaking
Hey, bro! Can we learn some idioms today?
Idioms are a great idea!
Which type of idioms do you want to start with?
Something fun like food idioms or maybe business idioms since you like that?

scenes.setting: Plain white wall background, bright even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Young East Asian man with glasses stands against a white wall. He wears a black sweater over a white shirt. He holds a smartphone and a wired microphone. He gestures enthusiastically and waves goodbye.

scenes.visual_description: Presenter stands centered against a white wall, gesturing while speaking. App branding and download buttons appear on screen. He waves at the end.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: And that's why Fluently works because it's like a speaking partner in your pocket. Stop just learning a language. And start speaking English with Fluently App. See ya.
